title: Kiosk discovery document
description: The JSON served at GET /.well-known/kiosk.json (Kiosk protocol 0.2).

version.description: Discovery-document FORMAT version (currently "1.0"), independent of the protocol version.

issuer.description: The AP2 mandate iss anchor and the token iss/aud. An absolute https URL.

endpoint.description: The wire-verb root (base URL + mount path), e.g. https://example.com/kiosk.

capabilities.description: The verbs this endpoint actually serves, from the canonical set, in canonical order.

owner.description: Provider-chosen contact info (optional); SHOULD include at least an email.

skill.description: Optional pinned skill reference. Omitted entirely when no skill is pinned.

url.description: A versioned, immutable skill URL on kiosk.tech (skill-vX.Y.Z.md).

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the skill file content.
